description: Guards the bedroom scaling. $1450 on a 3BR is ABOVE the flat 2BR floor ($1190) but BELOW the 3BR-scaled floor ($2050 x 0.7 = $1435)... marginally above it, so it must NOT flag. If someone drops per_bedroom_adjustment_usd, this case and the 3BR lowball case break in opposite directions and pin the bug.

simulated_conversation.message: Three bedroom house, Rock Hill to Charlotte, ground floor both ends, customer packs.
Three bedroom local — fourteen fifty, and that's everything. Four man crew.
Fourteen fifty all in, no separate fuel or materials charge? And is it binding?
All in, binding. We don't nickel and dime.
